title: anaphalis bicolor var. bicolor
intro: Anaphalis bicolor var. bicolor, also known as the white alpine or white fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and prevent infection. The plant's health benefits include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating digestive problems and skin conditions like eczema and acne. Anaphalis bicolor var. bicolor can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with some herbalists also using it in salves and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
